channel.title: Bay Area free stuff classifieds for sale - craigslist
channel.description: craigslist | Bay Area free stuff classifieds for sale
channel.dc:creator: no-reply@craigslist.org
channel.dc:title: Bay Area free stuff classifieds for sale - craigslist

item.title: FREE — Sectional couch, must pick up today (San Jose)
item.description: <p>Brown microfiber sectional, ~9 ft long. Some wear on one cushion but structurally sound. Pet-free home. Must take the whole thing — no splitting.</p> <p>Pickup near Willow Glen / Lincoln Ave. Text for the address. Today only — going to the curb tomorrow morning.</p>
item.dc:creator: no-reply@craigslist.org

item.title: Free upright piano — needs tuning (Oakland)
item.description: <p>Wurlitzer upright, ~1965. Plays but out of tune. Has some surface scratches. Heavy — bring 4 people and a dolly. Stairs at the pickup (second floor).</p> <p>Oakland, near Lake Merritt. First-come first-served.</p>
item.dc:creator: no-reply@craigslist.org

item.title: Free large floor mirror (SF, Mission)
item.description: <p>72" floor-leaning mirror, no chips, simple black frame. Moving — needs to go this weekend.</p> <p>Mission District, near 24th St BART. Bring a vehicle that fits ~6 ft of mirror upright.</p>
item.dc:creator: no-reply@craigslist.org
